positive: A majestic, stylized woodland scene rendered in intricate, bold black linework on a creamy, pale background. The central composition features interlocking elements: celestial moons, oversized bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate fox silhouettes, and swirling floral mandalas, all integrated into a seamless, circular decorative pattern. Use a graphic novel aesthetic blended with Art Nouveau elegance. Strong, uniform contrast and clean outlines are essential. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a t-shirt print. Highly detailed etching style, vector graphic quality, deep ink tones.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, grain, low resolution, signature, dirty, photo, realistic, color gradient
